nasb.text: The two pillars, the one sea, and the stands which Solomon had made for the house of the Lord—the bronze of all these vessels was beyond weight.

esv.text: As for the two pillars, the one sea, and the stands that Solomon had made for the house of the Lord, the bronze of all these vessels was beyond weight.

cnv.text: 所羅門為耶和華殿所做的兩根銅柱、一個銅海和十個銅座，這一切器皿的銅，重得無法可稱。

ccb.text: 所罗门为耶和华的殿所造的两根铜柱、一个铜海和一些盆座，用的铜多得无法计算。
